## Description

Briefly describe what this PR changes and why it is needed.

## Related User Story / Project Item

- Link: #

## Change Scope

- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Deployment
- [ ] Documentation

## Core Review Checklist

Complete this section for every PR.

- [ ] Linked to a user story, issue, or GitHub Project item
- [ ] Branch name and PR title follow the team naming convention
- [ ] PR description clearly explains the purpose and scope
- [ ] The change is focused, relevant, and meets the agreed requirement
- [ ] The change has been tested or otherwise validated before review
- [ ] CI/CD pipeline has run successfully and the results were checked
- [ ] No secrets, sensitive data, or obvious security risks were introduced
- [ ] Reviewer feedback has been addressed before merge

## Backend Checks

Complete this section only if the PR changes backend code or backend configuration.

- [ ] API behaviour, validation, and error handling are correct
- [ ] Database interactions and service logic work as expected
- [ ] No sensitive data is exposed in logs or responses
- [ ] Backend code and structure follow project conventions
- [ ] Relevant unit or integration tests are included or updated where applicable

## Frontend Checks

Complete this section only if the PR changes frontend code or frontend configuration.

- [ ] UI behaviour matches the expected user flow
- [ ] Forms, loading states, and error messages are handled properly
- [ ] API integration works correctly
- [ ] Frontend code and structure follow project conventions

## Performance Checks

Complete this section where performance or scalability may be affected.

- [ ] No unnecessary loops, repeated API calls, or redundant processing
- [ ] Queries or data handling are efficient for current usage
- [ ] No obvious performance degradation was introduced
- [ ] Consideration given to scalability where relevant

## CI/CD and Deployment Checks

Complete this section only if the PR changes workflows, Docker, environment configuration, or deployment settings.

- [ ] Workflow, Docker, or deployment configuration is correct
- [ ] Deployment impact is clearly stated where applicable
- [ ] Relevant pipeline or deployment evidence is attached or visible

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Documentation

## Evidence

- [ ] Screenshots attached where relevant
- [ ] Pipeline result attached or visible
- [ ] Deployment evidence attached where applicable
